body:
## Overview

This sub-issue tracks Phase 1 TUI implementation. PR #91 completed the documentation foundation (DESIGN.md, ARCHITECTURE-DECISIONS.md, .claude/rules/tui.md). This issue focuses on building the actual dashboard, panels, and CLI integration.

## Parent Issue
Blocks: #89 (Product Review: Add TUI)
Blocked By: PR #91 (documentation foundation)

## Scope - Phase 1 Implementation

### 1. Spike/Prototype (1 day)
- [ ] Create minimal Textual prototype with dummy data
- [ ] Verify Textual compatibility with Python 3.11+
- [ ] Build single panel (crawl phase) with mock progress
- [ ] Test async/await patterns with Textual

Acceptance Criteria:
- Prototype runs without errors
- Progress bar updates in real-time
- Keyboard shortcuts work (q to quit, vim keys for nav)

### 2. StateManager Implementation
- [ ] Implement StateManager class (src/tui/models/state.py)
- [ ] Add phase tracking (idle → running → paused → completed/error)
- [ ] Add metrics accumulation (jobs, tokens, cost, items/sec)
- [ ] Add top matches calculation
- [ ] Document thread-safety constraints (NOT thread-safe, requires @work exclusive)

Acceptance Criteria:
- StateManager.add_job() accumulates data correctly
- StateManager.start_phase() initializes metrics
- Progress % calculated correctly
- Top 5 matches by score always available

### 3. Panels Implementation
- [ ] CrawlPanel (progress bar, job count, tokens/sec, eta)
- [ ] PreprocessPanel (token counting, chunk stats)
- [ ] AssessPanel (assessment progress, top matches visible)
- [ ] ExportPanel (report generation status)
- [ ] BasePanelWidget (shared layout, styling)

Acceptance Criteria:
- Each panel reads from StateManager
- Panels switch visibility as workflow progresses
- Real-time metrics update without blocking

### 4. Dashboard Integration
- [ ] Implement Dashboard (main Textual App, src/tui/dashboard.py)
- [ ] Keyboard navigation (Tab to switch panels, q to quit)
- [ ] Layout (sidebar for phase selector, main area for current panel)
- [ ] Cost tracker display (live token + USD accumulation)

Acceptance Criteria:
- All 4 panels render correctly
- Keyboard nav works smoothly
- Cost tracker updates in real-time
- Dashboard doesn't crash under load

### 5. CLI Integration
- [ ] Update cli.py to use TUI dashboard for all command
- [ ] Add --no-tui flag to preserve text output (backward compat)
- [ ] Route crawl/preprocess/assess phases through StateManager
- [ ] Connect existing progress callbacks to StateManager updates

Acceptance Criteria:
- cli.py --all launches TUI dashboard
- cli.py --all --no-tui uses old text output
- All 4 phases show on dashboard
- Cost accumulation accurate

### 6. Testing & Documentation
- [ ] Unit tests for StateManager (progress, metrics, top matches)
- [ ] Integration tests for StateManager + panels
- [ ] Dashboard smoke tests (renders, keyboard works)
- [ ] Manual testing: crawl 100 jobs, verify dashboard metrics
- [ ] Update README with TUI usage and --no-tui flag

Acceptance Criteria:
- Unit test coverage >= 80%
- All integration tests pass
- Manual test: metrics match actual job count + tokens
- Documentation complete

## Timeline
- Spike/Prototype: 1 day
- StateManager: 1 day
- Panels: 1.5 days
- Dashboard: 0.5 days
- CLI Integration: 1 day
- Testing: 1.5 days
- Total: 6-7 days

## Success Criteria
✅ TUI dashboard replaces verbose text output for all command
✅ Real-time progress bars for all 4 phases
✅ Live cost tracking (tokens + USD)
✅ Top 5 matches visible in assess panel
✅ Backward compat via --no-tui flag
✅ All tests passing
✅ No degradation vs text-based output accuracy

## Related
- Parent Issue: #89 (Product Review: Add TUI)
- PR #91: Documentation foundation
- Blocked By: #90 (Phase 2 depends on Phase 1)
title: Phase 1: Implement TUI Foundation Dashboard (Sub-issue of #89)
